params.SpellDescription: If the {2}{W}{W} cost was paid, an opponent chooses up to two nonland permanents they control and returns them to their owner's hand. Destroy all nonland permanents.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: If the {2}{W}{W} cost was paid, an opponent chooses up to two nonland permanents they control and returns them to their owner's hand. Destroy all nonland permanents.

params.Description: You may pay {2}{W}{W} rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
